evals.expected_output: Should ask clarifying questions before jumping to a solution.
assertions: Asks at least one clarifying question
Does NOT propose a solution before understanding the problem

evals.prompt: Do something outside this skill's scope.
evals.expected_output: Should recognize this is out of scope and redirect.
assertions: Recognizes the request is outside its scope
Does NOT attempt the out-of-scope task
Suggests the right tool or skill for the job
Explains it only investigates, not modifies
